case_title: GALLANT, LAURIE et al VS CARR, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $868.00 FILED BY GALLANT, LAURIE MEFFORD, MARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, MICHAEL THE HILL TRAVEL, INC. ALASKA AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
